name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-40
title: Extend historical-tag scrub to non-spec.md doc surfaces (SKILL.md, contract.md)
description:
BACKLOG-38 scrubbed historical-burden tags (Plan/BUG/BACKLOG refs) from feature spec.md files and added a regression test (contract/test/test-spec-bodies-no-historical-tags.py) that enforces the rule. The test's scope is spec.md ONLY. Three genuine violations exist in non-spec.md doc surfaces and were left untouched per BACKLOG-38's anti-scope.

VIOLATIONS (HEAD 46bc7ba8):
- rabbit-feature/skills/rabbit-feature-new/SKILL.md:74 — '(moved from rabbit-cage in RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-26).'
- rabbit-file/skills/rabbit-file/SKILL.md:119 — '... before turning RED → GREEN (BACKLOG-2). A bug fix without ...'
- rabbit-file/docs/spec/contract.md:26 — '... Enforces per-field length limits and ASCII-control-char sanitisation (BACKLOG-7). ...'

FALSE POSITIVES (do NOT scrub):
- rabbit-file/skills/rabbit-file/SKILL.md:60 — 'Returns assigned ID (e.g. RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-17)' — example of the algorithm's output, same pattern as the spec.md false positives
- rabbit-file/skills/rabbit-file/SKILL.md:172 — '"name": "RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-17"' in a JSON schema example
- rabbit-file/skills/rabbit-file/SKILL.md:217 — 'RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-16/' in a directory layout illustration
- rabbit-file/skills/rabbit-file/SKILL.md:221 — 'RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-3/' same

SCOPE OF FIX:
1. Scrub the 3 genuine violations
2. Extend test-spec-bodies-no-historical-tags.py to cover SKILL.md and contract.md surfaces (or split into a second test file). Allowlist needs to grow to cover the 4 SKILL.md algorithm-output examples.
3. Per-feature version bumps for the affected features (rabbit-feature, rabbit-file)

DISCIPLINE: cross-feature, session-override + superpowers TDD (same pattern as BACKLOG-38). Direct push to dev.

DETECTED BY: ws04 CONTRACT-BACKLOG-38 wave as alongside finding, 2026-05-25.

history.note: TDD cycle complete (session-override + superpowers TDD, cross-feature bundle wave)
